text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is a downtown Edo girl from Oi. Some
see her background as a regional racer as a
weakness, but she's determined to make them eat
their prejudices by blowing them away with her
incredible racing skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream is to turn the Twinkle Series into a
grand festival—a celebration where everyone will
see her standing in the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals are her classmates Super Creek and
Oguri Cap, and she eagerly awaits the day the
three of them can light up a track together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We prepare for her upcoming competitions in
every way, even bringing tatami mats into my
office to better relax. Her once-in-a-lifetime
chance at the Twinkle Series is about to begin!
